series_metadata.series_title: eWarrants - Warrant and Protection Order Information
series_metadata.series_description: This record documents the transactions, record inquires, file uploads, and data entries performed by users of the eWarrants application, which is electronic warrant and protection order tool used by criminal justice agencies to facilitate the entry, authorization, and service of records from court into Law Enforcement Automated Data System (LEADS) eWarrants contains supplemental information, included but not limited to, Computerized Criminal History and Driver information Data obtained from LEADS uploaded as a file attachment for law enforcement purposes

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: six (6) years a record is served, recalled, or expired
